textByHashes.88f916fc14d2779cbe5a9305bd6c82f170bf3f81: Hello, I've got some wares in you might have lost. Care to take a look?
textByHashes.d93786d74af5fe77cd5c657b6ecbf3ccbd662cb1: I'm Chris, travelling repairman. If you need something repaired, I can do it for you if you've got the money for it.
textByHashes.a7e79d9dca47167557fdc3e7672348fb4c4a7827: I've also got a collection of items people end up losing a lot. Nothing fancy, and certainly nothing you couldn't get elsewhere, maybe for free. Still, I charge a convenience fee for having it right here. Interested?
textByHashes.d4efea7f8e3af9f12701c1e567a333998fa4277c: Yeah, some things will break if you get killed in the Wilderness. And if you die deep in the Wilderness, they can vanish altogether.
textByHashes.1841640e88d4ee00d2dd36d0ec554525ed8a23f3: For a fee, sure. Just show me the broken item.
textByHashes.0f4b57f0e48e38bf7036b2df9299b88056e87296: Well, if you bring me a Trouver Parchment and some coins, I can enchant some items so they won't disappear if you end up losing them deep in the Wilderness.
textByHashes.4f2d5ebeb37ad39cb01cbaee9d78959498ee8121: If you need a Trouver Parchment, there's a mage up in Ferox Enclave called Justine who sells them. I've also heard rumours there's a cave in the Wilderness with creatures that sometimes carry them as well.
textByHashes.0a815e85305e9bf3dbab8477e5e3bf20542ad7ae: Eh, some poor sap walks in carrying one, gets himself killed, and the creature just hangs on to it as a trophy? I can see it.
textByHashes.8f3cc9cd7554263d2c3cebb1ddb6dc44edf21c61: Hey there. I can't offer my usual services right now, but if you're interested, I picked up a few bits that would let me change your appearance, if you're interested.
textByHashes.211cc7b4d153a6be5a46734630badfdc2c2a1dd0: Huh, I knew the Makeover Mage said that would work, but I didn't actually believe them!
textByHashes.75ed2895e148c6bef708620fcf28fcd3690404e0: Not too shabby from some sheep shears, if I do say so myself!
textByHashes.115a44ea007c3038121def192368a424b3ebd5f0: Are you looking for a haircut or a shave?
textByHashes.785c376ce6d4874e3c29fdee501ea64df9d1a075: Are you wanting a new top or some new legwear?
textByHashes.8b081a94979714fb20c3557fa0da9228372be1ed: Really? I got that out of a bin in Draynor! Well, if you're sure...
textByHashes.a4e5b3ab6b12907e7af0ceffc368ccdbbef96f0e: Well, they'll keep the sand off your feet at least...
textByHashes.6c009157b03a14c0de8640e1140d4f4c880b5742: Because I put it there, you fool! If you want an anvil by a bank, I suggest you find your own!
